abilities.name: Shield Breaker
abilities.text: When a fight has to happen face-to-face, Ker turns the first step forward into a threat of its own.

abilities.name: Iron Bulwark
abilities.text: Once per round, when a route would punish exposed armor or broken ground, Ker can brace through the worst of it.

abilities.name: Close-Quarters Doctrine
abilities.text: Ker is at his best when the enemy is too close to run and too close to lie.

abilities.name: Hold the Line
abilities.text: When the breach pressure rises, Ker makes a narrow path feel like a fortress.
